scripts.copy-zk-assets: rm -rf ./public/keys ./public/zkir && mkdir -p ./public/keys ./public/zkir && cp ../contract/src/managed/htlc/keys/* ./public/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/htlc/zkir/* ./public/zkir/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/usdc/keys/* ./public/keys/ && cp ../contract/src/managed/usdc/zkir/* ./public/zkir/ && cp ../cardano/plutus.json ./public/plutus.json
scripts.build:start: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.build:start:preview: npm run build:preview && npm run start
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
